title: state_polished
description: Final formatted output. Written by the polish phase, runs only on the emit branch (not on cycles that recurse). The model produces clean markdown rendering of the surviving crafted outputs (filtered by the evaluation's presentation_recommendation). Decode reads polished_markdown verbatim into CTP_brief_<slug>.md.

polished_markdown.description: Clean markdown rendering of the surviving outputs. Written verbatim into CTP_brief_<slug>.md by decode.

presented_output_ids.description: Which output_ids from state_2_output were carried into the polished output.
